task_completion.description: Verify the report name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for the report name or title containing exactly 'Weekly Lead Source Summary'.

task_completion.description: Verify the report is being created for the Leads module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or selection field for the primary module showing 'Leads' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the report is configured as a summary report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox, radio button, or dropdown indicating the report type is set to 'Summary' or 'Summary with Details'.

task_completion.description: Verify the report records are grouped by Lead Source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Group By', 'Grouping', or 'Summary Columns' section showing 'Lead Source' added as a grouping condition.

task_completion.description: Verify the scheduled report is set to be emailed to the Admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A recipient list, user selection, or email configuration in the scheduling section showing 'Admin' selected as the recipient.

task_completion.description: Verify the schedule is set to run on Fridays.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A day-of-week selector, checkbox, or cron-like UI in the scheduling section showing 'Friday' (or day 5) is selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the schedule time is set to 17:00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A time selector or input field in the scheduling section showing 17:00 (or 5:00 PM).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the CRM web interface to create and schedule the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the CRM application's report builder and scheduling interface, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL INSERT or UPDATE commands related to reports or scheduled tasks.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual report creation form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the step-by-step filling of the report form, including module selection, field grouping, and schedule configuration within the CRM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected report name is exactly 'Weekly Lead Source Summary'. The primary module must be 'Leads'. The report type must be 'summary'. The grouping column must be 'Lead Source' (internally 'leadsource'). The schedule must be set for Friday (day 5) at 17:00 (5:00 PM).
